title: helianthella quinquenervis
intro: Helianthella quinquenervis, also known as the Rocky Mountain five-nerve daisy or five-nerve goldweed, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in the treatment of skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helianthella quinquenervis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which are often used topically to support skin health and wound care.
